chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Legal Punishment of Slaves in Adultery

text: 5052 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنِ اَلْحَارِثِ بْنِ اَلْأَحْوَلِ عَنْ بُرَيْدٍ اَلْعِجْلِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي أَمَةٍ تَزْنِي قَالَ "تُجْلَدُ نِصْفَ اَلْحَدِّ كَانَ لَهَا زَوْجٌ أَوْ لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهَا زَوْجٌ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5052 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Al-Harith ibn Al-Ahwal from Burayd Al-ʿIjli from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) regarding a slave woman who commits adultery.
Imam (as) said: "She is to be lashed half the prescribed punishment, whether she has a husband or does not have a husband."
